description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Temporary Service Adjustment of Park Island Ferry Services
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 珀麗灣客運渡輪服務臨時調整

2026-05-03T19:46:00.CONTENT_EN:
The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 4 May 2026:
Park Island Transport Company Limited
'Ma Wan - Central' Route:
- Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p. m. and 7:30 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)
- Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p. m. and 8:00 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)

'Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan' Route:
- Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a. m. is cancelled
- Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a. m. is cancelled.
2026-05-03T19:46:00.CONTENT_CN:
以下渡輪服務於2026年5⽉4⽇作出臨時調整：
珀麗灣客運有限公司
「⾺灣-中環」航線：
-⾺灣⾄中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運
-中環⾄⾺灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運

「⾺灣-荃灣」航線：
-⾺灣⾄荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次
-荃灣⾄⾺灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次。

2026-05-04T20:10:00.CONTENT_EN: The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 5 May 2026: Park Island Transport Company Limited 'Ma Wan - Central' Route: - Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p. m. and 7:30 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) - Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p. m. and 8:00 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) 'Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan' Route: - Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a. m. is cancelled - Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a. m. is cancelled
2026-05-04T20:10:00.CONTENT_CN: 以下渡輪服務於2026年5⽉5⽇作出臨時調整： 珀麗灣客運有限公司 「⾺灣-中環」航線： -⾺灣⾄中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 -中環⾄⾺灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 「⾺灣-荃灣」航線： -⾺灣⾄荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次 -荃灣⾄⾺灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次

2026-05-05T20:36:00.CONTENT_EN: The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 6 May 2026: Park Island Transport Company Limited 'Ma Wan - Central' Route: - Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p. m. and 7:30 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) - Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p. m. and 8:00 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) 'Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan' Route: - Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a. m. is cancelled - Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a. m. is cancelled
2026-05-05T20:36:00.CONTENT_CN: 以下渡輪服務於2026年5⽉6⽇作出臨時調整： 珀麗灣客運有限公司 「⾺灣-中環」航線： -⾺灣⾄中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 -中環⾄⾺灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 「⾺灣-荃灣」航線： -⾺灣⾄荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次 -荃灣⾄⾺灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) adds temporary train trips
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 高速鐵路(香港段)加開臨時列車服務

2026-05-04T06:22:00.CONTENT_EN: In response to the demand, the High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) will add the following temporary train trips: 4-5 May: From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Shenzhenbei Station: G5680 From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Futian Station: G5866 From Shenzhenbei Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: G5679 From Futian Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: G5865 Tickets are available for purchase through the 12306 official website or mobile app; appointed travel agents; or at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station. For train schedules, please refer to the 12306 official website or mobile app, or the High Speed Rail website or mobile app.
2026-05-04T06:22:00.CONTENT_CN: 配合客運需求，高速鐵路(香港段)將加開以下臨時列車車次： 5月4日至5月5日 由香港西九龍站前往深圳北站：G5680 由香港西九龍站前往福田站：G5866 由深圳北站前往香港西九龍站：G5679 由福田站前往香港西九龍站：G5865 你可透過12306官方網站或手機應用程式、指定代理或前往香港西九龍站購買列車車票。 有關列車服務詳情，請瀏覽12306官方網站或手機應用程式、高速鐵路網頁及手機應用程式。
